sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95857" key="spermati/as" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπερμ-ᾰτίας</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σικυός, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, a cucumber or gourd <sense id="n95857.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">left to ripen for seed</tr_>, opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εὐνουχίας</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:136" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">136</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
